name: stockdash-backend
description: Stock Broker Dashboard Backend — Fastify + Socket.IO + Prisma

scripts.db:seed:prod: node -e "const{PrismaClient}=require('@prisma/client');const bcrypt=require('bcrypt');const p=new PrismaClient();Promise.all([bcrypt.hash('password123',12),bcrypt.hash('password456',12)]).then(([h1,h2])=>Promise.all([p.user.upsert({where:{email:'alice@example.com'},update:{},create:{email:'alice@example.com',passwordHash:h1}}),p.user.upsert({where:{email:'bob@example.com'},update:{},create:{email:'bob@example.com',passwordHash:h2}})])).then(()=>{console.log('Seeded demo users');return p.$disconnect()}).catch(console.error)"
